introSection: Indy-Blitz is a Zierer Force One kiddie roller coaster located at Heide Park in Soltau, Lower Saxony, Germany.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Indy-Blitz has a very similar (but not identical) layout to Zamperla's Family Gravity Coaster 80STD. Other Force Ones from Zierer follow the same layout, but mirrored. The ride's front car is themed as an Aztec/Red Indian.

fullText:
Indy-Blitz is a Zierer Force One kiddie roller coaster located at Heide Park in Soltau, Lower Saxony, Germany.

Indy-Blitz has a very similar (but not identical) layout to Zamperla's Family Gravity Coaster 80STD. Other Force Ones from Zierer follow the same layout, but mirrored. The ride's front car is themed as an Aztec/Red Indian.
